amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Recital 61 b (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Recital 61 b (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission



(61b)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

(61b) When AI systems are intended to be used at the workplace, harmonised standards should be limited to technical specifications and procedures.

When AI systems are intended to be used at the workplace, harmonised standards should be limited to technical specifications and procedures.
